terminals.name: Start Backend
terminals.command: cd drsearch_backend && poetry run uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8011
terminals.description: Launches the FastAPI backend application using Uvicorn on port 8011.

terminals.name: Start Frontend
terminals.description: Starts the Next.js frontend development server on port 3000.

terminals.name: Run E2E Tests
terminals.description: Runs the Playwright end-to-end test suite with coverage collection enabled.
